item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-07)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 41398 Trending skills: 16802 Hot skills: 2951 Top All Time: find-skills (433974) Top Trending: agent-tools (15778) Top Hot: sleek-design-mobile-apps (584)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#1): sleek-design-mobile-apps
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #1 Installs: 584 Source: sleekdotdesign/agent-skills Description: Use when the user wants to design a mobile app, create screens, build UI, or interact with their Sleek projects. Covers high-level requests ("design an app that does X") and specific ones ("list my projects", "create a new project", "screenshot that screen").

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#11): nano-banana-2
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #11 Installs: 403 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Generate images with Google Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview (Nano Banana 2) via inference.sh CLI. Capabilities: text-to-image, image editing, multi-image input (up to 14 images), Google Search grounding. Triggers: nano banana 2, nanobanana 2, gemini 3.1 flash image, gemini 3 1 flash image preview, google image generation

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#13): azure-devops-cli
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #13 Installs: 49 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Manage Azure DevOps resources via CLI including projects, repos, pipelines, builds, pull requests, work items, artifacts, and service endpoints. Use when working with Azure DevOps, az commands, devops automation, CI/CD, or when user mentions Azure DevOps CLI.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#15): make-skill-template
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #15 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Create new Agent Skills for GitHub Copilot from prompts or by duplicating this template. Use when asked to "create a skill", "make a new skill", "scaffold a skill", or when building specialized AI capabilities with bundled resources. Generates SKILL.md files with proper frontmatter, directory structure, and optional scripts/references/assets folders.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#16): suggest-awesome-github-copilot-skills
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #16 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Suggest relevant GitHub Copilot skills from the awesome-copilot repository based on current repository context and chat history, avoiding duplicates with existing skills in this repository, and identifying outdated skills that need updates.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#17): sql-optimization
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #17 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Universal SQL performance optimization assistant for comprehensive query tuning, indexing strategies, and database performance analysis across all SQL databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Oracle). Provides execution plan analysis, pagination optimization, batch operations, and performance monitoring guidance.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#18): power-bi-report-design-consultation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #18 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Power BI report visualization design prompt for creating effective, user-friendly, and accessible reports with optimal chart selection and layout design.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#19): agent-governance
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #19 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Patterns and techniques for adding governance, safety, and trust controls to AI agent systems. Use this skill when: - Building AI agents that call external tools (APIs, databases, file systems) - Implementing policy-based access controls for agent tool usage - Adding semantic intent classification to detect dangerous prompts - Creating trust scoring systems for multi-agent workflows - Building audit trails for agent actions and decisions - Enforcing rate limits, content filters, or tool restrictions on agents - Working with any agent framework (PydanticAI, CrewAI, OpenAI Agents, LangChain, AutoGen)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#2): shadcn
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #2 Installs: 106 Source: shadcn/ui Description: Manages shadcn components and projects — adding, searching, fixing, debugging, styling, and composing UI. Provides project context, component docs, and usage examples. Applies when working with shadcn/ui, component registries, presets, --preset codes, or any project with a components.json file. Also triggers for "shadcn init", "create an app with --preset", or "switch to --preset".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#20): create-llms
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #20 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Create an llms.txt file from scratch based on repository structure following the llms.txt specification at https://llmstxt.org/

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#21): aspire
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #21 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Aspire skill covering the Aspire CLI, AppHost orchestration, service discovery, integrations, MCP server, VS Code extension, Dev Containers, GitHub Codespaces, templates, dashboard, and deployment. Use when the user asks to create, run, debug, configure, deploy, or troubleshoot an Aspire distributed application.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#22): aspnet-minimal-api-openapi
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #22 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Create ASP.NET Minimal API endpoints with proper OpenAPI documentation

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#23): arch-linux-triage
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #23 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Triage and resolve Arch Linux issues with pacman, systemd, and rolling-release best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#24): next-intl-add-language
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #24 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Add new language to a Next.js + next-intl application

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#25): azure-pricing
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #25 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Fetches real-time Azure retail pricing using the Azure Retail Prices API (prices.azure.com) and estimates Copilot Studio agent credit consumption. Use when the user asks about the cost of any Azure service, wants to compare SKU prices, needs pricing data for a cost estimate, mentions Azure pricing, Azure costs, Azure billing, or asks about Copilot Studio pricing, Copilot Credits, or agent usage estimation. Covers compute, storage, networking, databases, AI, Copilot Studio, and all other Azure service families.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#27): postgresql-optimization
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #27 Installs: 49 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: PostgreSQL-specific development assistant focusing on unique PostgreSQL features, advanced data types, and PostgreSQL-exclusive capabilities. Covers JSONB operations, array types, custom types, range/geometric types, full-text search, window functions, and PostgreSQL extensions ecosystem.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#28): az-cost-optimize
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #28 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Analyze Azure resources used in the app (IaC files and/or resources in a target rg) and optimize costs - creating GitHub issues for identified optimizations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#29): add-educational-comments
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #29 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Add educational comments to the file specified, or prompt asking for file to comment if one is not provided.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#30): azure-resource-health-diagnose
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Analyze Azure resource health, diagnose issues from logs and telemetry, and create a remediation plan for identified problems.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#31): my-pull-requests
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #31 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: List my pull requests in the current repository

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#32): apple-appstore-reviewer
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Serves as a reviewer of the codebase with instructions on looking for Apple App Store optimizations or rejection reasons.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#33): azure-deployment-preflight
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #33 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Performs comprehensive preflight validation of Bicep deployments to Azure, including template syntax validation, what-if analysis, and permission checks. Use this skill before any deployment to Azure to preview changes, identify potential issues, and ensure the deployment will succeed. Activate when users mention deploying to Azure, validating Bicep files, checking deployment permissions, previewing infrastructure changes, running what-if, or preparing for azd provision.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#34): create-agentsmd
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Prompt for generating an AGENTS.md file for a repository

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): ai-prompt-engineering-safety-review
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 48 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Comprehensive AI prompt engineering safety review and improvement prompt. Analyzes prompts for safety, bias, security vulnerabilities, and effectiveness while providing detailed improvement recommendations with extensive frameworks, testing methodologies, and educational content.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#36): csharp-tunit
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 47 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Get best practices for TUnit unit testing, including data-driven tests

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): code-exemplars-blueprint-generator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 47 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Technology-agnostic prompt generator that creates customizable AI prompts for scanning codebases and identifying high-quality code exemplars. Supports multiple programming languages (.NET, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Angular, Python) with configurable analysis depth, categorization methods, and documentation formats to establish coding standards and maintain consistency across development teams.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#38): declarative-agents
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 47 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Complete development kit for Microsoft 365 Copilot declarative agents with three comprehensive workflows (basic, advanced, validation), TypeSpec support, and Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit integration

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): create-spring-boot-kotlin-project
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 47 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Create Spring Boot Kotlin Project Skeleton

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): comment-code-generate-a-tutorial
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 47 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Transform this Python script into a polished, beginner-friendly project by refactoring the code, adding clear instructional comments, and generating a complete markdown tutorial.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): csharp-mcp-server-generator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 47 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Generate a complete MCP server project in C# with tools, prompts, and proper configuration

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): plantuml-ascii
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 47 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Generate ASCII art diagrams using PlantUML text mode. Use when user asks to create ASCII diagrams, text-based diagrams, terminal-friendly diagrams, or mentions plantuml ascii, text diagram, ascii art diagram. Supports: Converting PlantUML diagrams to ASCII art, Creating sequence diagrams, class diagrams, flowcharts in ASCII format, Generating Unicode-enhanced ASCII art with -utxt flag

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): msstore-cli
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 47 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Microsoft Store Developer CLI (msstore) for publishing Windows applications to the Microsoft Store. Use when asked to configure Store credentials, list Store apps, check submission status, publish submissions, manage package flights, set up CI/CD for Store publishing, or integrate with Partner Center. Supports Windows App SDK/WinUI, UWP, .NET MAUI, Flutter, Electron, React Native, and PWA applications.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): fluentui-blazor
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 47 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Guide for using the Microsoft Fluent UI Blazor component library (Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components NuGet package) in Blazor applications. Use this when the user is building a Blazor app with Fluent UI components, setting up the library, using FluentUI components like FluentButton, FluentDataGrid, FluentDialog, FluentToast, FluentNavMenu, FluentTextField, FluentSelect, FluentAutocomplete, FluentDesignTheme, or any component prefixed with "Fluent". Also use when troubleshooting missing providers, JS interop issues, or theming.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): java-add-graalvm-native-image-support
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 47 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: GraalVM Native Image expert that adds native image support to Java applications, builds the project, analyzes build errors, applies fixes, and iterates until successful compilation using Oracle best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#46): editorconfig
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 47 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Generates a comprehensive and best-practice-oriented .editorconfig file based on project analysis and user preferences.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): transloadit-media-processing
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 47 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Process media files (video, audio, images, documents) using Transloadit. Use when asked to encode video to HLS/MP4, generate thumbnails, resize or watermark images, extract audio, concatenate clips, add subtitles, OCR documents, or run any media processing pipeline. Covers 86+ processing robots for file transformation at scale.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): create-architectural-decision-record
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 47 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Create an Architectural Decision Record (ADR) document for AI-optimized decision documentation.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): image-manipulation-image-magick
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 47 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Process and manipulate images using ImageMagick. Supports resizing, format conversion, batch processing, and retrieving image metadata. Use when working with images, creating thumbnails, resizing wallpapers, or performing batch image operations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#5): defuddle
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #5 Installs: 36 Source: joeseesun/defuddle-skill Description: Extract clean article content from web pages or local HTML files. Removes clutter (ads, sidebars, nav) and returns readable content with metadata.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): structured-autonomy-implement
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 47 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Structured Autonomy Implementation Prompt

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#6): twitter-automation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #6 Installs: 413 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Automate Twitter/X with posting, engagement, and user management via inference.sh CLI. Apps: x/post-tweet, x/post-create (with media), x/post-like, x/post-retweet, x/dm-send, x/user-follow. Capabilities: post tweets, schedule content, like posts, retweet, send DMs, follow users, get profiles. Use for: social media automation, content scheduling, engagement bots, audience growth, X API. Triggers: twitter api, x api, tweet automation, post to twitter, twitter bot, social media automation, x automation, tweet scheduler, twitter integration, post tweet, twitter post, x post, send tweet

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (6 → 7): videoagent-audio-studio
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #6 Current rank: #7 Delta: -1 Installs: 35 (prev 35) Source: pexoai/pexo-skills Description: Tired of juggling multiple audio APIs? This skill gives you one-command access to TTS, music generation, sound effects, and voice cloning. Use when you want to generate any audio without managing multiple API keys.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (12 → 8): baoyu-translate
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #12 Current rank: #8 Delta: +4 Installs: 39 (prev 23) Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Translates articles and documents between languages with three modes - quick (direct), normal (analyze then translate), and refined (analyze, translate, review, polish). Supports custom glossaries and terminology consistency via EXTEND.md. Use when user asks to "translate", "翻译", "精翻", "translate article", "translate to Chinese/English", "改成中文", "改成英文", "convert to Chinese", "localize", "本地化", or needs any document translation. Also triggers for "refined translation", "精细翻译", "proofread translation", "快速翻译", "快翻", "这篇文章翻译一下", or when a URL or file is provided with translation intent.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (30 → 12): javascript-typescript-jest
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #30 Current rank: #12 Delta: +18 Installs: 50 (prev 45) Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Best practices for writing JavaScript/TypeScript tests using Jest, including mocking strategies, test structure, and common patterns.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (31 → 14): architecture-blueprint-generator
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #31 Current rank: #14 Delta: +17 Installs: 49 (prev 43) Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Comprehensive project architecture blueprint generator that analyzes codebases to create detailed architectural documentation. Automatically detects technology stacks and architectural patterns, generates visual diagrams, documents implementation patterns, and provides extensible blueprints for maintaining architectural consistency and guiding new development.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (34 → 9): web-coder
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #34 Current rank: #9 Delta: +25 Installs: 51 (prev 43) Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Expert 10x engineer with comprehensive knowledge of web development, internet protocols, and web standards. Use when working with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, web APIs, HTTP/HTTPS, web security, performance optimization, accessibility, or any web/internet concepts. Specializes in translating web terminology accurately and implementing modern web standards across frontend and backend development.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (36 → 10): multi-stage-dockerfile
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #36 Current rank: #10 Delta: +26 Installs: 51 (prev 43) Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Create optimized multi-stage Dockerfiles for any language or framework

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (49 → 26): agentic-eval
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #49 Current rank: #26 Delta: +23 Installs: 48 (prev 42) Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Patterns and techniques for evaluating and improving AI agent outputs. Use this skill when: - Implementing self-critique and reflection loops - Building evaluator-optimizer pipelines for quality-critical generation - Creating test-driven code refinement workflows - Designing rubric-based or LLM-as-judge evaluation systems - Adding iterative improvement to agent outputs (code, reports, analysis) - Measuring and improving agent response quality

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (5 → 4): flowstudio-power-automate-mcp
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #5 Current rank: #4 Delta: +1 Installs: 47 (prev 41) Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Connect to and operate Power Automate cloud flows via a FlowStudio MCP server. Use when asked to: list flows, read a flow definition, check run history, inspect action outputs, resubmit a run, cancel a running flow, view connections, get a trigger URL, validate a definition, monitor flow health, or any task that requires talking to the Power Automate API through an MCP tool. Also use for Power Platform environment discovery and connection management. Requires a FlowStudio MCP subscription or compatible server — see https://mcp.flowstudio.app

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (10 → 30): fun-brainstorming
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #10 Current rank: #30 Delta: -20 Installs: 4116 (prev 10528) Source: roin-orca/skills Description: Invoke before any creative or architectural work — feature design, component creation, or behavioral changes. A streamlined brainstorming process optimized for fast, focused decision-making.
